name: Tiramisu 7
recipeInstructions:
FOR THE SYRUP: Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then cool. Stir in the coffee and brandy.
FOR THE FILLING: Whisk the yolks in a bowl until smooth. Gradually whisk in the sugar and Marsala. Heat over simmering water, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat and beat with an electric mixer until very cold. In another bowl, mash the Mascarpone with a rubber spatula until smooth. Fold in the mascarpone mixture. Whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form, then fold it in.
Cut the Pan di Spagna into thin vertical slices. Arrange a layer of slices at the bottom of a gratin dish and brush lightly with syrup. Spread half the filling over the slices. Repeat with another slice of Pan di Spagna, syrup, and filling. Continue this pattern until all ingredients are used. Top with the remaining Pan di Spagna slice, brushing lightly with syrup.
Whip the heavy cream with sugar to form a smooth topping. Spoon over the top of the dessert. Decorate with cinnamon and coffee grounds. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
